title: helichrysum athanaton
intro: Helichrysum athanaton, also known as Everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its white, daisy-like flowers that retain their color when dried. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum athanaton include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce scarring, and improve skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Helichrysum athanaton can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and skincare.
